revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-020

Steel with a carbon content between about 0.15 and 0.25 %. By decreasing the carbon content greater ductility is obtained at the expense of strength.


Note: Heat treatments may be used to improve selected characteristics of the material.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Mild steel}}
